name: RACon
summary: RACon — your console. A vrapplication (browser, Pyodide) that loads .egg cartridges and runs each as its own in-browser twin. The user-facing layer for the whole RAPP ecosystem: drop in an .egg cartridge, the egg incubates and hatches.
tagline: Your console. Drop in an .egg cartridge, it hatches.

loads.cartridges: .egg cartridges (incubation files) — and one-file agent.py loaders
loads.how: fetch (cloud raw-GitHub, default) or drop a local .egg → unpack in Pyodide → run its agents as a vTwin
loads.note: RACon is itself a vrapplication that loads its own carts. Builder mechanics (twins, twin-chat, §13) stay under the hood.
